summary: Completed testing of Ghost Striking Fixes for CSDROP Portal (Iteration 14). All 8 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Key fixes verified: -u flag in Popen for unbuffered output, error-screenshot endpoint returns 404 when no screenshot exists, sync modal is bigger (max-w-2xl), live feed refreshes every 3s, terminal syntax highlighting works, STREAMING indicator visible when bot running.
passed_tests: GET /api/csdrop/error-screenshot returns 404 when no error screenshot exists
POST /api/csdrop/launch spawns bot with -u flag (logs appear immediately)
GET /api/csdrop/logs returns boot diagnostics with DB pulse info
GET /api/csdrop/logs returns expected fields (running, logs, source)
Frontend: STREAMING indicator visible when bot running
Frontend: Terminal syntax highlighting works (green for success/complete, red for error, cyan for phases, indigo for hooks)
Frontend: Sync modal is wider (max-w-2xl class present)
Frontend: Boot messages visible in terminal (Launching, Promo, BOOT messages)
Frontend: Code Runner tab still works (regression)
seed_data_creation: None required - using existing CSDROP user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ghost Striking fixes verified. Key changes: 1) -u flag in Popen (line 1349 server.py) for unbuffered Python output, 2) _verify_message_sent() function in sovereign.py for DM verification, 3) Human delays: 8-15s between DMs (line 348), 45-90s batch cooldowns (line 354), 4) _capture_error() for error screenshots, 5) 10s timeout on textbox wait_for_selector, 6) Sync modal max-w-2xl (line 396 CsdropDashboard.jsx), 7) Live feed 3s refresh (line 222). Bot will error on Discord proxy but boot diagnostics appear correctly.

unbuffered_output.flag: -u in Popen command at line 1349 in server.py
unbuffered_output.verified: Logs appear immediately after bot launch

terminal_syntax_highlighting.red: error, fatal, critical, banned, failed, timeout
